text: Conflict Action: While defending, spend 1 fate. Choose a holding in your dynasty discard pile - for this conflict, this holding becomes a copy of the other holding. You may move this holding to the attacked province. (Max 1 per conflict.)
name: Floating Fortress

text: After a holding is revealed in a province you control, add the top card of your dynasty deck to that province, faceup. Action: Sacrifice a holding - draw 1 card and gain 1 fate.
flavorText: In origami and in life, a single crease changes everything.
name: Kaiu Mitsurugi

text: Cannot be evaded by the covert keyword. Reaction: After this character wins a conflict as the defender at a province with or adjacent to a holding - it does not bow as a result of the conflict's resolution.
name: Deployed Garrison

text: Reaction: After you win a [conflict-military] conflict as the attacker at a non-stronghold province, if all your participating characters are Berserker - break the attacked province.
name: War Cry

text: Reaction: After this character enters play, choose a status token - discard it and gain 1 honor.
flavorText: What purpose have the Kuni so far from the Shadowlands?
name: Herald of Jade

text: Conflict Action: Sacrifice a holding and choose an attacking character with printed cost 3 or lower - bow that character.
name: Ramshackle Façade

text: Dishonored [clan-crane] characters you control get +1[conflict-military] and +1[conflict-political]. Reaction: After you play a character, dishonor that character and bow this stronghold. Choose an opponent’s province - look at the top 2 cards of that opponent's dynasty deck. Discard each card from that province and put one of the looked at cards into that province faceup. Put the other card on the bottom of their deck.
name: Mioko's Song

text: Reaction: After this character enters play - honor it.
flavorText: "I am happy to serve. In triplicate, you say?"
name: Dōji Aspirant

text: Reaction: After this character wins a [conflict-political] conflict - look at the top 2 cards of your conflict deck. Add one of those cards to your hand and put the other on the bottom of your conflict deck.
name: Eloquent Advocate

text: Conflict Action: Choose a character - set that character's [conflict-military] and [conflict-political] skill to 3 until the end of the conflict. If this character is honored, the chosen character also cannot receive status tokens until the end of the conflict.
flavorText: We must adapt to the new land to reap its blessings.
name: Daidōji Ienori

text: Reaction: If this attachment is in play or in your hand, after all players reveal their cards in the dynasty phase, if the total printed cost of characters in your provinces is lower than 6 or higher than 12, remove this card from the game - set aside each card in your provinces, refilling them faceup. Then, shuffle the set aside cards back into your deck.
name: Lucky Coin

text: Peaceful. (This card cannot be played during a conflict.) Action: Bow a character you control and choose a character. Select one - that character either cannot be declared as an attacker or cannot be declared as a defender this phase. (Max 1 per round.)
name: In Lady Dōji's Service

text: This character gets +1[conflict-military] and +1[conflict-political] for each card under it. You may play Kihō cards under this character as if they were in your hand. Action: Place a card from your hand facedown under this character. Then, draw a card.
name: Togashi Tsurumi

text: Conflict Action: Choose another participating Bushi character you control - until the end of the conflict, apply the printed skill modifiers of each attachment attached to that character to this character as well.
flavorText:
"Here, none of us belong."
- Kitsuki Masanori
name: Mirumoto Rei

text: Reaction: After you play this character, choose a Weapon attachment in your conflict discard pile - add that attachment to your hand.
flavorText: Peace never lasts for long.
name: Master at Arms

text: Restricted. Courtier character only. Reaction: After this attachment enters play, choose an opponent and name a card - that opponent reveals 4 cards at random from their hand. Discard each copy of the named card revealed in this way. (Max 1 per round.)
name: Honest Assessment

text: Restricted. While attached character has a Dragon's Fang attachment, it gains: “Conflict Action: Choose a participating character with lower [conflict-military] skill than this character - move that character home and bow it.”
name: Dragon's Claw

text:
Restricted.
Sincerity.
flavorText: Fang and Claw. Together they spell death.
name: Dragon's Fang

text: Action: Bow this stronghold. Choose a character you control with no Follower attachments - put the top card of your conflict deck into play, facedown, attached to that character as a +1[conflict-military], +1[conflict-political] Follower attachment.
name: Pride

text: Conflict Action: If this character has a Follower attachment, choose a participating character. That character's controller selects one - they choose and discard an attachment on that character, or bow that character.
flavorText: Armies march on their bellies.
name: Akodo Cho

text: Reaction: After this character enters play, choose a character - put the top card of your conflict deck into play, facedown, attached to that character as a +1[conflict-military], +1[conflict-political] Follower attachment.
name: Noble Vanguard

text: Restricted. Reaction: After this card enters play - search the top 5 cards of your conflict deck for a Follower attachment, reveal it, and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your conflict deck in a random order.
name: Ashigaru Company

text: Costs 1 less to play while you control a Shugenja character. Action: Sacrifice this attachment and choose a [clan-lion] character in one of your discard piles - for this conflict, attached character gains each printed ability of the chosen character.
name: Spirit of Valor

text: [conflict-military] Conflict Action: Sacrifice an attachment on a participating character you control. Your opponent chooses a participating character they control - bow that character.
name: Spearhead

text: Action: While you have claimed - the [element-air] ring, gain 1 honor. - the [element-earth] ring, draw 1 card. - the [element-fire] ring, honor a character. - the [element-water] ring, ready a character with cost 2 or lower. - the [element-void] Ring, gain 1 fate.
name: Asako Reina

text: Reaction: After the [element-fire] ring is claimed, choose a Scholar or Monk character - ready that character.
name: Henshin Seeker

text: Reaction: After you claim the [element-void] ring - place 1 fate on this character.
flavorText: Only the lowest acolytes were permitted to go.
name: Void Acolyte

text: Action: Choose up to X different rings in your claimed ring pool, where X is the number of Monk characters you control - resolve each chosen ring's effect. (Max 1 per round.)
name: Riddles of the Henshin

text: Action: Choose an unclaimed ring - discard all fate on that ring and claim it as a [conflict-political] ring. (Max 1 per round.)
flavorText: These spirits have been silent for a thousand years.
name: Commune with the Spirits

text: Conflict Action: Choose a character you control - move it to the conflict. Conflict Action: If the [element-water] ring is in your claimed ring pool, spend 1 fate. Choose a character (controlled by any player) - move it to the conflict. (Max 1 per round.)
name: One with the Sea

text: Reaction: After this character commits or moves to a conflict, choose a character - until the end of the conflict, that character cannot be chosen as a target of opponents' events.
flavorText: The difference between poison and medicine is perspective.
name: Yogo Tadashi

text: Action: Choose a non-Weapon attachment you control - return it to its owner's hand.
flavorText: Intriguing properties, don't you think?
name: Shosuro Botanist

text: Conflict Action: Dishonor this character and choose a participating character - that character gets -3[conflict-military] and -3[conflict-political] for this conflict.
flavorText: It doesn't take long to create secrets.
name: Nightshade Infiltrator

text: Attached character cannot be readied outside the fate phase. [conflict-military] Conflict Action: If this card is in your hand, lose 1 honor. Choose an attacking character - put this card into play attached to that character.
name: Stinger

text:
Attached character gains pride.
Attached character must commit to each [conflict-military] conflict, if able.
flavorText: Kampai!
name: Liquid Courage

text: When you play this character, it enters play under the control of an opponent of your choice. (You may still put fate on it.) Poison attachments on characters you control gain ancestral.
name: Cherished Family Servant

text: Reaction: After you play a Foreign or out-of-clan card, bow this stronghold - search the top 5 cards of your conflict deck for a card that shares a Trait with it. If you find a card, reveal it, and add it to your hand. Otherwise, gain 1 fate. Shuffle.
name: The East Wind

text: Conflict Action: At a [element-water] province, choose a character you control or discard a card from your hand to choose a character you do not control - move that character to the conflict. At the end of the conflict, honor that character if you control it and it won the conflict.
name: Maelstrom

text: Conflict Action: Choose a participating character and an attacked province - for this conflict, set the skill matching the conflict type of that character to the strength of that province.
name: Shinjo Atagi

text: Conflict Action: For this conflict, this character gets +1[conflict-military] for each faceup province controlled by your opponent.
flavorText: "We have always been explorers."
name: Moto Raiju

text: Peaceful. Attach to a character you control. Reaction: After you play this card, choose an opponent's eligible facedown province - ready attached character. Immediately declare your next conflict for the phase, against that province with attached character as an attacker. That province cannot be broken during this conflict.
name: Scout's Steed

text: Peaceful. (This card cannot be played during a conflict.) Action: Choose an unbroken non-stronghold province - reveal it or turn it facedown.
flavorText: There is so much to learn about this place.
name: Lay of the Land

text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict as the attacker - take 1 fate from the defending player.
flavorText: How long can she keep him in check?
name: Yuta

text: This character gets +1[conflict-military] and +1[conflict-political] while you have the Imperial Favor, or it gets -1[conflict-military] and -1[conflict-political] while an opponent have the Imperial Favor.
flavorText: She is young, but she will learn. And we will teach her.
name: Empress' Retainer

text: Action: If you have the Imperial Favor - honor this character.
flavorText: "My Lord, I prepared these manifests for you. In triplicate!"
name: Otomo Sycophant

text: Legendary 1. No attachments. No duels. Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose another participating character - injure that character. (To injure a character: if the character has no fate on it, discard it. Otherwise remove 1 fate from it.)
name: Bake-Kujira

text: If attached character is a [clan-crab] character, it gains +1 glory during glory counts. Attached character contributes its glory to glory counts even while bowed. Story Victory: Daniel Correas [clan-crab]
name: The Empress' Legacy

text: Action: Choose an attachment - discard it.
flavorText: "Are you going to carry your grudges with you too?"
name: Disarm

text: Restricted. Attach to a character you control. Conflict Action: If attached character is ready, sacrifice this attachment - move attached character to the conflict.
flavorText: "These boats will put you ashore, but I'm not sure what you'll find when we get there."
name: Ayubune Pilot

text: This character gets +1[conflict-military] for every two facedown cards under it. Reaction: After this character enters play on your side during a conflict or commits to a conflict, choose up to two cards in the same discard pile - place those cards under this character, facedown.
flavorText: Not every newcomer to the island was invited.
name: Stowaway
